title: Hermetic casting totals
casting_score: Technique + Form + Stamina − Encumbrance + Aura Modifier

totals.formulaic: Casting Score + die (simple if calm, stress if stressful) ; cast if ≥ Level
totals.spont_nonfatiguing: Casting Score / 5 ; no die, no botch, no Fatigue
totals.ritual: Casting Score + Artes Liberales + Philosophiae + stress die ; long-term Fatigue

formulaic_outcome: Total ≥ Level → 0 Fatigue. Short by 1-10 → cast, −1 Fatigue. Short by 11+ → fails, −1 Fatigue.
penetration: Penetration Total = Casting Total − Spell Level + Penetration Bonus ; affects a target only if > its Magic Resistance.
magic_resistance: Base = the most applicable Form score (Vim default); Parma Magica adds 5 × Parma; a creature's MR = its Might (+ aura modifier).
